reviews.review_description: Horrible,my grandma can make better graphics,this game looks like the dump I took 5 minutes ago,I'd rather be in Serbian rat torture than play this game again

The graphics suck, half of the assets looks like a toddler made them and it lags a lot. Not to mention there isn’t any game play. From what I saw, you can only walk. Let’s not mention how soft the dev is, you fire back aggressively when you get bad reviews. If you can’t hand that, then this business isnt for you.

First, it's very unoptimized. The world kept glitching and freaking out even if I stood still and did nothing. Surprisingly, the world stabilized when I recorded, but it was still choppy.

Second, the *lag.* Turning my head quickly showed an entire black void, alongside just the game running at a very low frame rate.

Grabbing things also doesn't work, as my hands are *opposite* to where they would be irl (e.g., if my hands are facing downward irl, they'd be facing upward in the game), and trying to grab things would result in grabbing the *wrong thing?* Like, my hand reaches for a sword, but then suddenly a shield gravitates towards my hand.

It *could* have promise, but maybe if the game could run better, I would've given it more time.

developer_response.body: the game is free... thats how you were able to leave a review FYI XD - the game isnt complete yet thats why it's a pre-order right... anyways... If you dont like it and dont want to support then no ones forcing you do to do anything. Thanks for playing :)

reviews.review_description: I have gave a review before this giving key points as to why his game has some breakpoints and he gives me an developer response and he explains the fact he doesn't live with his parents which doesn't matter whatsoever if you do or not so I'm not quite too sure why he said that and then he responds with "don't have the freedom to work on it consistently " which explains alot of poeple point so I'm not sure why he's arguing against himself there and he touches upon the fact he has bills to pay which fair enough but if that's the case that should give you more determination to make the game better so quick summary not only does his game have some clear breakpoints his explanation for it also has breakpoints at the time of making this I hope you have applied for a job not in this industry as making games is not your strong suit even you said that yourself when you said you can't work on it as consistent as other games on meta so hopefully you have saw my review and if you give me a response like last time don't bother unless your going to explain it more thoroughly.

developer_response.body:
your review got taken down for profanities and personal attacks on me for what? an early access alpha tech demo? Your gonna put a sign on my car because you didnt like my tech demo?

come back and leave a review when the game is done rather than rating like a full game while the game is actively being worked on and still in early stages. Thanks for playing.

reviews.review_title: Om so glad that I got this game
reviews.review_description:
(If your reading this in vr, read in your mobile app to see the whole thing)
I am so glad I got this game because it taught me to be grateful for all the actually good games that I have.

There are no gameplay mechanics that work. There's buttons to spawn enemies that don't work, when you grab a weapon your hand phases through, your screen shakes enough to make me feel sick (I have never felt sick or dizzy in my last two years of playing vr) when you move, invisable walls everywhere, bows cant fire arrows as they glitch into each other, enemys that spawn die in one hit, stabbing enemies makes you fly because of collision bugs, and crouching makes your legs fall in the ground.

This game is fodder that fills up the meta store. It's on the same level as gorrila tag fan games in that you find it when looking for something actually enjoyable to play. Please PLEASE PLEASE PLEASE PLEASE PLEASE 🙏delete this. The knowledge of this existing makes my balls shrivel smaller by the day.

The developer is super harsh to valid criticism (delete the game IS good advice btw). And worst of all, they expect you to pay 30 dollars to play this piece of crap with a friend.

developer_response.body: Youre purposely review bombing an early access tech demo - why dont you wait a bit before reviewing because god knows youre not coming back when the game is done so all you are is quite literally a Sh*t stain. lmfao.

developer_response.body: Ive spent months working on the sword combat system. It renders at full resolution, no weapons disappear, this feels like low effort trolling... restart the headset... weapons do not disappear, the bow might be a little buggy but everything else is a functioning work in progress

reviews.review_description:
You expect me to pre-order singleplayer let alone multiplayer after that 
Atrocious 
 gameplay demo?

Fat chance.

The weapons wouldn't grip in the right orientation, and the only NPC I could find died when I just touched him with my weapon.

If its functional after full release, maybe I'll check it out.

developer_response.body:
I'm truly sorry you had a bad experience - as you may have read in the other reviews, almost every minute of the day I'm working in the back end to make it a better experience. 

You're not forced to buy anything - the game is in early access and currently still in development. I appreciate your patience at this time while the game is currently in progress. 

The things that you've mentioned are being worked on actively and will be fixed - make a purchase when you feel comfortable. Theres no obligation, support if you feel like. 

Thanks for playing and reviewing - hope to make the experience above and beyond your expectations.

reviews.review_description: Needs lots of work. Solo dev so give him time.

reviews.review_description:
Obviously my game has some people BIG mad, im glad that this is somehow threatening to them. 1 star for resolution or draw distance is a curated attack on my game and is just disrespectful. Especially if a review isnt changed if ones opinionated problems are addressed…

not changing your rating even after problems have been fixed makes me feel like people really do have malicious intent with their reviews.

The game is a passion project so im glad some people are taking it so insanely serious considering im a solo developer. 😹

Ive tested this game publicly and have gotten nothing but a positive response from players picking up swords and slwing water melons. As of now this is a showcase of what what I built myself and am improving on. Ive only been eeveloping for a year so im excited for whats to come.

developer_response.body: Thank you myself -please try the new update - the game gets updated every 24 hrs

reviews.review_description:
This is the only free gladiator game thats on the market and it is amazing. its so cool to see what the solo developer has accomplished. This game is shaping up to be an amazing experience. 

And you dont even have to pay anything to mess around in it. It’s completely free!
Based off the reviews I thought this would be kinda lame. Totally *glad* I tried it! I really do feel like a gladiator and love squashing melons!
I liked how the gladiators looked and how they acted. The slicing watermelons could genuinely cure someones depression. Keep up the good work !

developer_response.body: haha appreciate it! second level is on the way, chipping away on the next update. Things should be more organized in the next updates. (plus more levels + enemies)

reviews.review_description: The biggest problem I have with this game is that the render distance and resolution suck. I see what you’re going for but it’s not looking too good.
